title: Wendy's Big Bacon / Mushroom Bacon line — calorie + macro card grid (cheatdaydesign.com)
html:
Wendy's Big Bacon Classic Double / Triple + Mushroom Bacon Cheeseburger / Double / Triple macro cards from cheatdaydesign.com (910 / 1,220 / 670 / 1,010 / 1,350 cal). Brotein dataset capture — biggest variants top out at 84g protein in a single sandwich.
